content.body:
- kb: validation (IDs, types, lifecycles, scopes, tags, content),
  load/save round-trip, error cases (94.1% coverage)
- config: defaults, save/load round-trip, invalid YAML, missing file (88.2%)
- profiles: default profiles validation, save/load, list filtering,
  edge cases (88.0%)
- storage: edge cases — read/delete not found, empty KB, query by tags,
  combined filters, no filter, overwrite, bulk validation failure,
  tag connections, health on missing dir (85.1%)
- cmd: init (structure creation, idempotency, --force), CRUD commands
  (read, write, query, delete, validate, reindex) with end-to-end
  tests using temp dirs (69.0%)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: test: add comprehensive test coverage across all packages
content.summary:
add comprehensive test coverage across all packages. - kb: validation (IDs, types, lifecycles, scopes, tags, content),
  load/save round-trip, error cases (94.1% coverage)
- config: defaults, save/...
